title: Decision concerning Supporting Materials in Connection with the Prosecution's Application for Warrants of Arrest pursuant to article 58
text: - […] pursuant to article 58 (1) and (7) of the Statute, the issuance of a warrant of arrest or a summons to appear is subject to the Pre-Trial Chamber's being satisfied that there are reasonable grounds to believe that the person has committed a crime falling within the jurisdiction of the Court; (p. 3).
keywords: art. 58.1.a RS ; warrant of arrest ; issuance of warrant of arrest ; reasonable grounds to believe commission of crime within jurisdiction of the Court by person ;
art. 58.7 RS ; functions and powers of the Pre-Trial Chamber ; issuance of a summons to appear ; reasonable grounds to believe commission of crime within jurisdiction of the Court by person ;
